---
# Denny Huang Talks

This site records Denny Huang's public talks, courses, panels, hosting, judging, and slide links.

Canonical human entrypoint:
- {{ "/" | absolute_url }}

Machine-readable data:
- {{ "/talks.json" | absolute_url }}: structured event records
- {{ "/slides.json" | absolute_url }}: structured slide records
- {{ "/llms-full.txt" | absolute_url }}: full Markdown export for agents
- {{ "/sitemap.xml" | absolute_url }}: search sitemap

Important indexes:
- {{ "/events/" | absolute_url }}
- {{ "/slides/" | absolute_url }}
- {{ "/topics/" | absolute_url }}

Notes:
- Original slide URLs are preserved for sharing.
- `/slides/*` pages provide searchable context and link back to original slides.
- Most content is Traditional Chinese with English product and event names kept as written.
